content.json:
# CISA KEV to MDVM Findings Correlation

Maps CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) to active vulnerability findings from Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management (MDVM) across the tenant. Identifies which actively exploited CVEs exist on which devices and tracks remediation progress.

**Pipeline:** MDE Agent → TVM API → Logic App (daily 02:00 UTC) → DCR → `MDETVM_CL`.

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
let KEV = MDETVM_CL
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
  | join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID;
let Stats = KEV
  | summarize
      KEVMatches      = count(),
      UniqueCVEs      = dcount(cveId),
      AffectedDevices = dcount(deviceName),
      RansomwareCVEs  = dcountif(cveId, knownRansomwareCampaignUse != 'Unknown'),
      PastDue         = countif(dueDate < now());
Stats
| mv-expand
    Metric = pack_array('KEV Matches','Unique CVEs','Affected Devices','Ransomware CVEs','Past Due') to typeof(string),
    Value  = pack_array(KEVMatches, UniqueCVEs, AffectedDevices, RansomwareCVEs, PastDue) to typeof(long)
| project Metric, Value

let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| extend DaysUntilDue = datetime_diff('day', dueDate, now())
| extend DueStatus = case(DaysUntilDue < 0, 'Past Due', DaysUntilDue < 14, 'Due < 14d', 'Due > 14d')
| project ['Device Name'] = deviceName, ['CVE ID'] = cveId, Software = softwareName, Version = softwareVersion, Severity = vulnerabilitySeverityLevel, ['CVSS Score'] = cvssScore, ['Ransomware Use'] = knownRansomwareCampaignUse, ['Due Date'] = dueDate, ['Due Status'] = DueStatus, ['Recommended Update'] = recommendedSecurityUpdate, ['Update Available'] = securityUpdateAvailable
| sort by ['Due Status'] asc, ['CVSS Score'] desc
content.title: Active KEV findings (all devices)

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| summarize ['KEV Count'] = dcount(cveId) by ['Device Name'] = deviceName
| top 10 by ['KEV Count'] desc
content.title: Top 10 devices by KEV count

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| summarize Count = count() by Software = softwareName
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 software products by KEV count
